summary: Comprehensive testing of Spiritual Teachings feature and Yoga Avatar Mini integration. All 30 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend features verified working correctly including teachings page with 10 teachers, search, themes view, teacher detail with expandable teachings, and navigation. Yoga avatar mini displays correctly in sequence view.
seed_data_creation: None required - teachers and themes are hardcoded in backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Spiritual Teachings feature fully tested. All 10 teachers (Buddha, Jesus, Muhammad, Krishna, Lao Tzu, Rumi, Thich Nhat Hanh, Yogananda, Ram Dass, Alan Watts) with teachings and quotes verified. 9 themes (love, suffering, consciousness, mindfulness, surrender, compassion, impermanence, nature, simplicity) working. AI Contemplation endpoint requires auth and uses GPT-5.2. Yoga Avatar Mini displays in sequence view when user has saved avatar config.

teachings_backend.GET /api/teachings/teachers: Returns 10 teachers with correct structure (id, name, tradition, era, color, bio, core_principle, themes, teaching_count, quote_count)
teachings_backend.GET /api/teachings/teacher/buddha: Returns full teacher with 5 teachings and 7 quotes
teachings_backend.GET /api/teachings/teacher/jesus: Returns full teacher data with teachings and quotes
teachings_backend.GET /api/teachings/themes: Returns 9 themes with label, color, and teachers array
teachings_backend.GET /api/teachings/theme/love: Returns teachers related to love theme
teachings_backend.POST /api/teachings/contemplate: Requires auth (401 without), generates AI contemplation with auth (200)

teachings_frontend.title: Page title 'Wisdom of the Ages' displayed
teachings_frontend.teacher_cards: All 10 teacher cards displayed with correct data-testid
teachings_frontend.search: Search input filters teachers by name/tradition
teachings_frontend.view_toggle: Teachers and Themes view toggle buttons work
teachings_frontend.themes_view: Themes view shows 9 themes with grouped teachers
teachings_frontend.teacher_detail: Clicking teacher shows detail view with bio, core principle, quotes, teachings
teachings_frontend.teachings_list: Teachings list expandable with content and practice section
teachings_frontend.ai_contemplation_btn: AI Contemplation button present in expanded teaching

yoga_avatar_mini.displays_in_sequence: YogaAvatarMini component renders in sequence view when user has avatar config
yoga_avatar_mini.canvas_rendering: Avatar canvas shows holographic figure with aura
yoga_avatar_mini.pose_adaptation: Avatar silhouette adapts based on pose name (warrior, lotus, standing)

navigation.teachings_link: Teachings link found in More dropdown (data-testid='nav-more-teachings')
navigation.yoga_link: Yoga link found in More dropdown (data-testid='nav-more-yoga')

frontend_ui_tested: Navigation More dropdown contains Teachings link
Teachings page loads with 10 teacher cards
Themes view displays 9 themes with grouped teachers
Teacher detail view shows bio, core principle, rotating quotes
Teachings list with expandable content and practice section
AI Contemplation button present in expanded teaching
Yoga page sequence view shows Avatar Mini when user has config
Avatar Mini canvas renders holographic figure
